waves.description: Define contracts and schemas for mission data structures, daemon APIs, and dashboard interfaces

work_packets.title: Mission Data Models & API Contracts
acceptance_criteria: Mission schema defines: id, status, detail, transcript, approval_state, visual_qa_data, costs
Dashboard API contract for Mission Detail, Transcript, Approval, Visual QA, Costs endpoints
work_packets.builder_prompt: Create data models and type definitions for: Mission (with detail, transcript, approval_state, visual_qa_data, costs fields), MissionRound, HumanInterventionRequest. Define Pydantic schemas or equivalent. Create base test fixtures that can be used across the integration test.

waves.description: Integration smoke test - end-to-end validation of daemon pickup, dashboard display, round visibility, and human intervention

work_packets.title: Operator Console End-to-End Smoke Test
acceptance_criteria: daemon picks up test issue as a mission
at least one complete mission round is visible end-to-end
when ask_human appears in a round, operator can trigger intervention from dashboard
work_packets.builder_prompt: Write an integration test that: (1) submits a test issue to the daemon, (2) verifies daemon picks it up and creates a mission, (3) navigates to dashboard and verifies Mission Detail/Transcript/Approval/Visual QA/Costs sections render, (4) executes a round and verifies round completion is visible, (5) simulates an ask_human scenario and verifies operator can intervene from the dashboard UI. Use the contracts from Wave 0. Assert against actual running services if available, or mock appropriately.
